title: VShowSequence Method, Spel Class
parameters: Sequence	String expression containing the name of a vision sequence to create.
description: Displays all objects in a sequence.
notes: Use VShowSequence to display the objects in a sequence without running the sequence. The active object color (magenta) is used for all objects so that they can be seen easily. One use is for when a robot camera is moved over a particular portion of a part being scanned with several sequences. After the robot is positioned, VShowSequence can be called to display the sequence.
see_also:
VShowModel

VShowSequence Example

VB Example:

m_spel.VShowSequence("myseq")

C# Example:

m_spel.VShowSequence("myseq");
